callSetups.rationale: EV momentum continuation; Jul 2 +8.44% with 77M volume. Break above 19 pre-market = CALL. Stop under 17.50 swing low.

vwapNotes: SPY 744.78 — flat near prior close; QQQ 712.60 — below VWAP, tech distribution clear; IWM 297.58 — mixed, small-cap range-bound. No VWAP data from Finnhub; confirm on platform.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 15.95 — normal range (15-20), options premium relatively cheap; complacency edge
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech/semiconductors weak (QQQ -1.73%, chip names down). EV/crypto/defense/biotech strong. Rotation into momentum/value.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: Jul 3 is half-day session ahead of Independence Day (1:00 PM ET close). No major earnings today. Q2 earnings season begins next week (PEP, DAL, LEVI, AZZ). 0DTE earnings play YASAK.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Holiday-thinned volume increases slippage and manipulation risk. US-Iran ceasefire reduces geopolitical tail risk. Fed on hold; no CPI/FOMC today.
